mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in >55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in consumer price inflation and deceleration in retail sales indicates stagflationary pressure that erodes real purchasing power and compresses profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no statistical edge over single-series baselines with p-value > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which supports near-term corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during supply-constrained regimes with Rank IC < -0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate strong residential construction demand and consumer confidence in durable goods, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with housing starts with t-statistic < 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly inflation exceeding 0.6% forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which increases discount rates and triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Market absorbs inflation shocks without drawdowns, yielding positive returns in >60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirms a robust labor market expansion that supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses predictive power when payroll growth falls below 100k monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth signals broad-based economic expansion that lifts corporate earnings forecasts, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: GDP acceleration fails to translate to equity gains during liquidity-constrained periods with IC < 0.01.
